DESCRIPTION: A value used to enhance specific effects.
For every 5 Skills played (default on normal difficulty), deal 3 damage to a random enemy and apply 1 Lift (Triggers a number of times equal to your Analysis).
For every 4 Attacks played (default on normal difficulty), deal damage to a random enemy equal to your Analysis, and apply 1 Lift (Triggers 4 times).
An innate property of enemies, equal to 10% of their Max HP (rounded down). When Lift reaches this value, triggers Levitate.
When stacks reach the target's Gravity, clears all stacks and triggers Levitate.

Loses all Block and gains 20 Deconstruction. Damage taken is increased by 50% and damage dealt is decreased by 70%. NL At the end of the turn, takes (Gravity + Lift) × 2 damage, then removes this status and clears all Lift.
Lift gained is doubled. At the end of the turn, reduces stacks by 1.
When played, choose one effect to activate.
When gaining Block, consumes an equal number of stacks to offset the Block gained.
Global field effect. Triggering a new Aspect replaces the existing one. Only 1 can be active at a time.
Aspects that tend to provide positive buffs or combo opportunities.
Aspects accompanied by severe negative penalties or extremely high risks.
Aspects that have double-edged sword effects or can alter basic gameplay mechanics.
